string 2:
I've observed a rather strange space.
An irregular world, cut off from normal space-time.

This theater, too, is a strange dimension created between
time and space... but the administrators have it under control.

Left unchecked, and the entire world could be affected,
so I want you to investigate this irregularity.

We don't want any further people interfering with irregular
space-time, since it could lead to greater ramifications...

...and that's why I've asked you alone. Should you be willing
to accept this task, please access the elevator here.

I've observed another irregular space.
It seems that a new Akashic Backdoor has emerged.
I'd like for you to investigate again.

Should you be willing to accept this task,
please access the elevator here.
